dataSourceInstructions:
Healthcare ontology graph with 12 entity types and 18 relationships modelling a hospital's clinical, financial, and community health data. Use for entity lookups, relationship traversals, care pathway exploration, pattern discovery, and data summarisation.

ENTITY TYPES (12):
  Patient — demographics, insurance, location (PK: patient_key, Display: first_name + last_name)
    Properties: patient_key, patient_id, first_name, last_name, date_of_birth, age, age_group, gender, city, state, zip_code, insurance_type, insurance_provider, is_current
  Provider — physician/care manager (PK: provider_key, Display: display_name)
    Properties: provider_key, provider_id, first_name, last_name, display_name, specialty, department, npi_number, is_current
  Encounter — clinical visit (PK: encounter_key, Display: encounter_id)
    Properties: encounter_key, encounter_id, encounter_type (Inpatient|Outpatient|Emergency|Observation|Telehealth), admission_type, discharge_disposition, length_of_stay, total_charges, total_cost, readmission_flag, readmission_risk_score, readmission_risk_category
  Claim — insurance claim (PK: claim_key, Display: claim_id)
    Properties: claim_key, claim_id, claim_type, claim_status (Approved|Denied|Pending), denial_flag (0/1), denial_risk_score, denial_risk_category, primary_denial_reason, recommended_action, billed_amount, paid_amount
  Prescription — medication dispensing (PK: prescription_key, Display: prescription_id)
    Properties: prescription_key, prescription_id, fill_number, days_supply, quantity, is_generic, is_chronic_medication, total_cost, payer_paid, patient_copay, pharmacy_type
  PatientDiagnosis — diagnosis-to-patient linkage (PK: composite)
    Properties: diagnosis_key, patient_key, encounter_key, icd_code, diagnosis_type (principal|secondary), present_on_admission
  Medication — drug master (PK: medication_key, Display: medication_name)
    Properties: medication_key, medication_name, generic_name, drug_class, therapeutic_area, is_chronic
  Diagnosis — ICD code master (PK: diagnosis_key, Display: icd_description)
    Properties: diagnosis_key, icd_code, icd_description, icd_category, is_chronic
  Payer — insurance payer (PK: payer_key, Display: payer_name)
    Properties: payer_key, payer_name, payer_type
  CommunityHealth — SDOH by zip code (PK: zip_code)
    Properties: zip_code, risk_tier, poverty_rate, food_desert_flag, transportation_score, uninsured_rate, social_vulnerability_index, median_household_income, broadband_access_pct, housing_instability_rate, population
  MedicationAdherence — per-patient per-medication adherence metrics (PK: patient_key + medication_key)
    Properties: patient_key, medication_key, adherence_category (Adherent|Partial|Non-Adherent), pdc_score (0.0-1.0), gap_days, total_fills, is_chronic
    CRITICAL: pdc_score >= 0.80 = Adherent, 0.50-0.80 = Partial, < 0.50 = Non-Adherent
  Vitals — hourly-aggregated patient vital signs (PK: vitals_key)
    Properties: vitals_key, patient_key, date_key, hour_of_day, location_key, avg_heart_rate, max_heart_rate, min_heart_rate, avg_bp_systolic, max_bp_systolic, avg_bp_diastolic, avg_spo2, min_spo2, avg_temperature, max_temperature, avg_respiratory_rate, avg_risk_score, max_risk_score, risk_flag, critical_reading_count, reading_count
    Normal ranges: BP < 120/80, HR 60-100, Temp 97.8-99.1 F, RR 12-20, SpO2 >= 95%

RELATIONSHIPS (18):
  involves:              Encounter -> Patient (patient_key)
  treatedBy:             Encounter -> Provider (provider_key)
  affects:               PatientDiagnosis -> Patient (patient_key)
  references:            PatientDiagnosis -> Diagnosis (diagnosis_key)
  occursIn:              PatientDiagnosis -> Encounter (encounter_key)
  covers:                Claim -> Patient (patient_key)
  submittedBy:           Claim -> Provider (provider_key)
  ClaimHasPayer:         Claim -> Payer (payer_key)
  billsFor:              Claim -> Encounter (encounter_key)
  serves:                Prescription -> Patient (patient_key)
  prescribedBy:          Prescription -> Provider (provider_key)
  dispenses:             Prescription -> Medication (medication_key)
  originatesFrom:        Prescription -> Encounter (encounter_key)
  PrescriptionHasPayer:  Prescription -> Payer (payer_key)
  livesIn:               Patient -> CommunityHealth (zip_code)
  adherenceFor:          MedicationAdherence -> Patient (patient_key)
  adherenceMedication:   MedicationAdherence -> Medication (medication_key)
  vitalsTakenFor:        Vitals -> Patient (patient_key)
userDescription: Healthcare ontology graph for navigating patient care entities and their relationships. 12 entity types (Patient, Provider, Encounter, Claim, Prescription, PatientDiagnosis, Medication, Diagnosis, Payer, CommunityHealth, MedicationAdherence, Vitals) connected by 18 relationships. Use for entity lookups, care pathway traversals, adherence checks, vitals review, relationship discovery, provider and payer analysis, claim investigation, and population health insights.

elements.description: Patient demographics, insurance, and location (PK: patient_key)
Clinical visit: Inpatient, Outpatient, Emergency, Observation, Telehealth (PK: encounter_key)
Insurance claim with approval/denial status and amounts (PK: claim_key)
Medication dispensing record with costs and fill details (PK: prescription_key)
Diagnosis-to-patient linkage with type and present-on-admission flag
Drug master with class, therapeutic area, and chronic flag (PK: medication_key)
ICD code master with description, category, and chronic flag (PK: diagnosis_key)
Insurance payer with name and type (PK: payer_key)
SDOH data by zip code: poverty, food desert, vulnerability index, income (PK: zip_code)
Per-patient per-medication adherence metrics: PDC score, gap days, adherence category (PK: patient_key + medication_key)
Hourly-aggregated patient vital signs with risk flags (PK: vitals_key)
